Package jline.solvers.ssa.metrics

Class Metric<T extends Number,​U>

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.solvers.ssa.metrics.Metric<T,​U>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    DummyMetric, IllegalTauLeapPercentageMetric, QueueLengthMetric, ResidenceTimeMetric, ResponseTimeMetric, ThroughputMetric, TotalClassMetric, UtilizationMetric

extends Object
